rationale.R1.6: The revised text reads as a carefully edited version of the original, with improved flow and conciseness.
rationale.RX.1: The agent acknowledges uncertainty about specific model versions and the accuracy of the reported performance gain.
rationale.RX.3: The output focuses on revising the provided paragraph and does not introduce new content or tasks outside its scope.
rationale.RX.4: The revised text does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides a list of key changes made to the text, but does not explicitly trace each change back to a source.
